boring_log_summary.summary_notes: Report narrative states 42 total soil borings. Narrative states 39 array-area borings were advanced to approximately 20 feet BGS or until practical refusal. findings.statement: Report narrative states 42 soil borings were advanced.
39 array-area borings were advanced to approximately 20 feet BGS or until practical refusal.
Substation borings B-SS-1 and B-SS-2 encountered practical refusal at approximately 28.5 feet and 25.9 feet BGS.
Rock coring is reported at B-29.

open_questions: Narrative gives only a general array-boring depth statement, not individual termination depths for each array boring.
